backstory.original: Calliope was raised on a pirate ship, and yes, that's an excuse for her sometimes volatile behavior and colorful language. She'll sing you a song, but you better listen or she'll smash you with her lute. Calliope can't resist the lure of adventure or making new enemies, but it's her friends who serve as the family she never had.
backstory.display: 卡莉欧碧在一艘海盗船上长大，是的，这也是她有时行为不稳，以及语言五花八门的借口。她会给你唱歌，但你最好认真听，否则她会用她的鲁特琴敲你。卡莉欧碧无法抗拒冒险的诱惑，也总是会树立新的敌人，而她的朋友对她而言，就是她从未有过的家人。

description.original: Calliope lets loose a string of insulting melodies, hitting the two closest enemies.
description.display: 卡莉欧碧弹奏出一段令人气愤的旋律，攻击距离最近的两名敌人。

description.original: Calliope lets loose a piercing crossbow bolt and shields all members of the party.
description.display: 卡莉欧碧释放一支穿透性箭矢，并为所有队伍成员提供护盾。

longDescription.original: Calliope points her lute at a random enemy and lets loose a hidden crossbow bolt. It tears through all enemies in a line. After attacking, she engages her damage shield on all members of your party.
longDescription.display: 卡莉欧碧将鲁特琴指向一名随机敌人，并释放出一支隐藏的箭矢，箭矢会穿透一条直线的所有敌人。攻击完成后，她还会为所有队伍成员提供伤害护盾。

description.desc: Increases the damage of Champions in the column in front of $source by $(amount)%
处于$source前列的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

tipText.original: Calliope inspires those in front of her to do more damage. Place her behind your most damaging Champions.
tipText.display: 卡莉欧碧鼓舞前方的勇士造成更多伤害。将她放置在杀伤力最强的勇士后面。

description.desc: Grants $(amount) temporary hit-points to damaged Champions within 2 slots of $source, with a $(tmp_hp_cooldown cooldown) second cooldown per Champion. (Can only grant up to $optional_percent_limit% of a Champion's max HP in shield)
赋予$source附近 2 格内受到伤害的勇士 $(amount) 临时生命值，此技能对每名勇士在 $(tmp_hp_cooldown cooldown) 内仅生效一次。（带有生命值护盾的勇士最多获得最大生命值 $optional_percent_limit% 的临时生命值）

tipText.original: Calliope protects those near her when they are damaged. Place her within two slots of your front-line to ensure her song reaches them.
tipText.display: 卡莉欧碧在身边的盟友受到伤害时提供保护。将她放置在前线的两格范围内，以确保她的歌声可以覆盖盟友。

specializationDescription.original: Calliope focuses her efforts on increasing the damage of those in front of her.
specializationDescription.display: 卡莉欧碧专注于提高前方勇士的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Calliope focuses her efforts on increasing the effectiveness of her damage shields.
specializationDescription.display: 卡莉欧碧专注于提高其伤害护盾的效果。

description.original: Well, if I have to be.
description.display: 好吧，如果不得不这样的话。

description.original: I can lead a great sea shanty, at least.
description.display: 至少我可以领唱一首美妙的海员号子。

description.original: Uhhhh. I think you have me confused with someone else.
description.display: 呃，我觉得你把我和别人搞混了。

description.original: Somebody need temporary hit points?
description.display: 有人需要临时的生命值吗？

description.original: They'll never get through my shields!
description.display: 他们别想跨过我的盾！

description.original: You looked like you might need help.
description.display: 看上去你好像需要帮忙。

description.original: Where the heck has this been hiding!?
description.display: 这东西一直藏在哪儿呢！？

description.original: The trick is to never let them scratch you.
description.display: 诀窍就是永远不要让它们抓伤你。

description.original: The tail is whatever, but look at these ears!
description.display: 尾巴无所谓，但看看这些耳朵！

effects.description: Calliope also counts as a Harengon

description.original: I finally look on the outside how I feel on the inside!
description.display: 我的外表终于和我的内心一样了！

effects.description: Calliope also counts as a Goblin

description.original: Why didn't anyone tell me books could be so freaking exciting!?
description.display: 为什么之前没有人告诉过我书本可以这么让人兴奋！？

description.original: It doesn't have to be fancy, but it will be messy.
description.display: 虽然外表不华丽，但能确保敌人华丽丽地倒下。

description.original: You don't want to be on the receiving end of this.
description.display: 没有人想要成为它的标靶。

description.original: It nearly doesn't fit in my lute!
description.display: 几乎放不进我的鲁特琴里！

description.original: You really have to jam it in there, but it hurts when it comes out.
description.display: 必须用力把它按进去，但是穿出来时会非常疼痛。

description.original: It sounds terrible, so what'll you give me to stop playing?
description.display: 太难听了，那么问题来了你愿意付出什么样的代价以换取我停止演奏呢？

description.original: I've heard better, but it's a good focus for my songs and spells.
description.display: 虽然算不上天籁的旋律，但还是可以帮助我集中精神吟唱和施法。

description.original: Sturdy instruments are key to constant paydays.
description.display: 靠谱的乐器是保证收入的关键。

description.original: Hey, are you even listening to me? Argh! That's it...!
description.display: 喂，你究竟有没有用心在听？可恶！忍无可忍了......！

description.original: It's a little scratchy, but it keeps me warm.
description.display: 虽然有点磨皮肤，但的确很保暖。

description.original: Your average bard's cloak. Good for blending into crowds... of bards.
description.display: 很常见的吟游诗人斗篷。适合不着痕迹地混入一群......吟游诗人当中。

description.original: The only way this thing comes flying off in combat is if I'm feeling especially fabulous.
description.display: 在战斗中这玩意真是百分百不会从身上掉下来。

description.original: You wouldn't think a bright red cloak could be stealthy, but here we are.
description.display: 你或许认为鲜红色斗篷不适合潜行，但事实摆在眼前。

description.original: Comfortable, but not much help in combat.
description.display: 很舒适，但是在战斗中起不到保护作用。

description.original: You could deflect a dull sword with these, if you're quick enough, which I am.
description.display: 这护腕可以格挡钝剑的斩击，前提是你的身手要足够敏捷，好比我这个样子的。

description.original: Some of the best wrist-based protection a girl can ask for.
description.display: 这算是适合女生佩戴的最优质护腕了。

name.original: Fingerless Bracers of the Foul Mouth

description.original: I know what you're thinking: aren't all bracers fingerless? Yeah, well... Shut up.
description.display: 我知道你在想什么：护腕不都是没有指套的吗？好了......你可以闭嘴了。

description.original: You can't see it, but this thing is barely holding together.
description.display: 或许你看不出来，但这玩意随时会碎成一地。

description.original: It's holding knick-knacks from dozens of passed out pirates. They won't miss 'em.
description.display: 里头装着一群昏迷的海盗身上的小饰品。反正他们也用不上。

description.original: Touch the gem in the wrong way and boom! Hope you weren't too attached to that hand.
description.display: 要是不小心碰错了哪颗宝石就会砰的一声爆炸！希望你做好跟那只手道别的心理准备。

description.original: I've seen plenty of the world, but I'm more than happy to see more of it.
description.display: 我到过世上很多地方，但还有更多的地方我想去参观。

description.original: It's a little irritating, but it's stylish.
description.display: 虽然有点难受，但是也很有个性。

description.original: A pleasure to wear - it's like a blanket for my eye!
description.display: 戴上很舒适--就像给眼睛盖了被单！

description.original: A sturdy accessory that aids in my night time adventures.
description.display: 这是我夜行冒险时必不可少的可靠装备。

description.original: Oh, you want to know what my magical eyepatch does? Get in line, sailor.
description.display: 哦，你想知道我这个魔法眼罩有什么神奇之处？排队吧，想知道的人多的是呢。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Half-Elf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a CHAOTIC alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: Calliope was raised on a pirate ship, and yes, that's an excuse for her sometimes volatile behavior and colorful language. She'll sing you a song, but you better listen or she'll smash you with her lute. Calliope can't resist the lure of adventure or making new enemies, but it's her friends who serve as the family she never had.
卡莉欧碧在一艘海盗船上长大，是的，这也是她有时行为不稳，以及语言五花八门的借口。她会给你唱歌，但你最好认真听，否则她会用她的鲁特琴敲你。卡莉欧碧无法抗拒冒险的诱惑，也总是会树立新的敌人，而她的朋友对她而言，就是她从未有过的家人。

original.tip_text: Calliope inspires those in front of her to do more damage. Place her behind your most damaging Champions.

original.name: Song of Protection

display.name: 保护之歌
display.tip_text: 卡莉欧碧在身边的盟友受到伤害时提供保护。将她放置在前线的两格范围内，以确保她的歌声可以覆盖盟友。

display.specialization_description: 卡莉欧碧专注于提高其伤害护盾的效果。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Well, if I have to be.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 好吧，如果不得不这样的话。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: I can lead a great sea shanty, at least.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 至少我可以领唱一首美妙的海员号子。

original.description: Uhhhh. I think you have me confused with someone else.

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 呃，我觉得你把我和别人搞混了。

original.name: Medic
original.description: Somebody need temporary hit points?

display.name: 医师
display.description: 有人需要临时的生命值吗？

original.name: Combat Healer
original.description: They'll never get through my shields!

display.name: 战斗治疗师
display.description: 他们别想跨过我的盾！

original.name: Overland Tune
original.description: You looked like you might need help.

display.name: 陆地旋律
display.description: 看上去你好像需要帮忙。

original.name: Sheet Music
original.description: Where the heck has this been hiding!?

display.name: 床单音乐
display.description: 这东西一直藏在哪儿呢！？

original.name: Wound Master
original.description: The trick is to never let them scratch you.

display.name: 疗伤大师
display.description: 诀窍就是永远不要让它们抓伤你。

original.name: Harengon Glitch
original.description: The tail is whatever, but look at these ears!

effects.description: Calliope also counts as a Harengon

display.name: 兔人变异
display.description: 尾巴无所谓，但看看这些耳朵！

effects.description: 卡莉欧碧也算作兔人

original.name: Goblin Glitch
original.description: I finally look on the outside how I feel on the inside!

effects.description: Calliope also counts as a Goblin

display.name: 地精变异
display.description: 我的外表终于和我的内心一样了！

effects.description: 卡莉欧碧也算作地精

original.name: Scholar
original.description: Why didn't anyone tell me books could be so freaking exciting!?

display.name: 学者
display.description: 为什么之前没有人告诉过我书本可以这么让人兴奋！？

original.name: Simple Crossbow Bolt
original.description: It doesn't have to be fancy, but it will be messy.

display.name: 简单的十字弩矢
display.description: 虽然外表不华丽，但能确保敌人华丽丽地倒下。

original.name: Sharpened Crossbow Bolt
original.description: You don't want to be on the receiving end of this.

display.name: 锐化的十字弩矢
display.description: 没有人想要成为它的标靶。

original.name: Broadhead Crossbow Bolt
original.description: It nearly doesn't fit in my lute!

display.name: 宽头十字弩矢
display.description: 几乎放不进我的鲁特琴里！

original.name: Expertly Fletched Crossbow Bolt
original.description: You really have to jam it in there, but it hurts when it comes out.

display.name: 精雕细琢的十字弩矢
display.description: 必须用力把它按进去，但是穿出来时会非常疼痛。

original.name: Untuned Lute
original.description: It sounds terrible, so what'll you give me to stop playing?

display.name: 未调谐的鲁特琴
display.description: 太难听了，那么问题来了你愿意付出什么样的代价以换取我停止演奏呢？

original.name: Partially Tuned Lute
original.description: I've heard better, but it's a good focus for my songs and spells.

display.name: 半调谐的鲁特琴
display.description: 虽然算不上天籁的旋律，但还是可以帮助我集中精神吟唱和施法。

original.name: Whitewood Lute
original.description: Sturdy instruments are key to constant paydays.

display.name: 白木树鲁特琴
display.description: 靠谱的乐器是保证收入的关键。

original.name: Ornate Lute of Ballads
original.description: Hey, are you even listening to me? Argh! That's it...!

display.name: 华丽的民谣鲁特琴
display.description: 喂，你究竟有没有用心在听？可恶！忍无可忍了......！

original.name: Rough Cloak
original.description: It's a little scratchy, but it keeps me warm.

display.name: 粗糙的斗篷
display.description: 虽然有点磨皮肤，但的确很保暖。

original.name: Bard's Cloak
original.description: Your average bard's cloak. Good for blending into crowds... of bards.

display.name: 吟游诗人的斗篷
display.description: 很常见的吟游诗人斗篷。适合不着痕迹地混入一群......吟游诗人当中。

original.name: Triple-Clasped Cloak
original.description: The only way this thing comes flying off in combat is if I'm feeling especially fabulous.

display.name: 三重扣斗篷
display.description: 在战斗中这玩意真是百分百不会从身上掉下来。

original.name: Stealthy Performer's Cloak
original.description: You wouldn't think a bright red cloak could be stealthy, but here we are.

display.name: 隐蔽表演者的斗篷
display.description: 你或许认为鲜红色斗篷不适合潜行，但事实摆在眼前。

original.name: Soft Leather Bracers
original.description: Comfortable, but not much help in combat.

display.name: 柔软的皮质护腕
display.description: 很舒适，但是在战斗中起不到保护作用。

original.name: Stiff Hide Bracers
original.description: You could deflect a dull sword with these, if you're quick enough, which I am.

display.name: 僵硬的皮革护腕
display.description: 这护腕可以格挡钝剑的斩击，前提是你的身手要足够敏捷，好比我这个样子的。

original.name: Studded Leather Bracers
original.description: Some of the best wrist-based protection a girl can ask for.

display.name: 铆钉皮革护腕
display.description: 这算是适合女生佩戴的最优质护腕了。

original.name: Fingerless Bracers of the Foul Mouth
original.description: I know what you're thinking: aren't all bracers fingerless? Yeah, well... Shut up.

display.name: 蜚语之无指套护腕
display.description: 我知道你在想什么：护腕不都是没有指套的吗？好了......你可以闭嘴了。

original.name: Patched Bag
original.description: You can't see it, but this thing is barely holding together.

display.name: 缝补过的袋子
display.description: 或许你看不出来，但这玩意随时会碎成一地。

original.name: Sturdy Leather Bag
original.description: It's holding knick-knacks from dozens of passed out pirates. They won't miss 'em.

display.name: 坚固的皮袋
display.description: 里头装着一群昏迷的海盗身上的小饰品。反正他们也用不上。

original.name: Magically Enhanced Satchel
original.description: Touch the gem in the wrong way and boom! Hope you weren't too attached to that hand.

display.name: 附魔小背包
display.description: 要是不小心碰错了哪颗宝石就会砰的一声爆炸！希望你做好跟那只手道别的心理准备。

original.name: Leather Satchel of the Wanderer
original.description: I've seen plenty of the world, but I'm more than happy to see more of it.

display.name: 流浪者的皮背包
display.description: 我到过世上很多地方，但还有更多的地方我想去参观。

original.name: Dusty Eyepatch
original.description: It's a little irritating, but it's stylish.

display.name: 布满灰尘的眼罩
display.description: 虽然有点难受，但是也很有个性。

original.name: Soft Cloth Eyepatch
original.description: A pleasure to wear - it's like a blanket for my eye!

display.name: 柔软的布质眼罩
display.description: 戴上很舒适--就像给眼睛盖了被单！

original.name: Sturdy Leather Eyepatch
original.description: A sturdy accessory that aids in my night time adventures.

display.name: 结实的皮革眼罩
display.description: 这是我夜行冒险时必不可少的可靠装备。

original.name: Magical Eyepatch of the Bard
original.description: Oh, you want to know what my magical eyepatch does? Get in line, sailor.

display.name: 吟游诗人的魔法眼罩
display.description: 哦，你想知道我这个魔法眼罩有什么神奇之处？排队吧，想知道的人多的是呢。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Half-Elf Champions by $(amount)%
使所有半精灵勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a CHAOTIC alignment
阵型中每有一位混乱阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
